title: capelio tomentosa
intro: Capelio tomentosa, also known as the velvet capelio, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of capelio tomentosa include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, colds, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of capelio tomentosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
